pilot_tasks.name: Smoke Test: Environment and Training Loop
pilot_tasks.description: Install LIBERO, download LIBERO-10 data, run 1-epoch training on 1 task. Verify the entire pipeline works end-to-end.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Training loop completes; loss decreases within 1 epoch; evaluation rollout executes without error
pilot_tasks.fail_action: Debug installation and dependency issues before proceeding

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: 10-task vs 5-task Comparison
pilot_tasks.description: Train 10-task model and 5-task model (tasks 0-4), seed 42, 100 rollouts per task. Check for measurable performance differences.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: At least 1 task shows >5% absolute success rate difference
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If all deltas < 3%: switch to Meta-World MT10 or heterogeneous LIBERO subset

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: BCS Quick Computation on 5 Tasks
pilot_tasks.description: Compute BCS for the 5-task subset (10 pairs). Extract bottleneck activations, PCA subspaces, linear probes. Visualize overlap vs alignment scatter.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: BCS values show non-trivial spread (std > 0.1); scatter plot reveals structure
pilot_tasks.fail_action: Adjust PCA k or switch to multi-layer analysis

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: GPTA on 5 Tasks
pilot_tasks.description: Compute GPTA with k=512 random projection for the 5-task subset. Check memory requirements and compute time scaling.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: GPTA computed without OOM on A6000; influence values are non-degenerate
pilot_tasks.fail_action: Reduce projection dimension to k=256; use gradient checkpointing

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Quick 5-Task LOO
pilot_tasks.description: Run 5 leave-one-out experiments on the 5-task subset (1 seed each). Correlate BCS and GPTA with these LOO results.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: LOO effects are measurable; at least one proxy shows rho > 0.3 against LOO ground truth
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If no signal: increase training time, switch to larger model, or change benchmark

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: 3-Seed BCS Stability Check
pilot_tasks.description: Train 3 base models (seeds 42, 123, 456), compute BCS for each. Measure Kendall-tau of pairwise rankings.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Kendall-tau > 0.4 for top-5 positive and top-5 negative pairs
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If tau < 0.3: implement seed-averaging protocol for all proxy computations

pilot_tasks.name: Pilot: Gradient Feature Clustering on 5 Tasks
pilot_tasks.description: Compute gradient features for 200 demonstrations across 5 tasks. k-means with k=5 and k=10. Measure silhouette score for task labels vs emergent clusters.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Silhouette score for task labels < 0.7 (cross-task structure exists)
pilot_tasks.fail_action: If silhouette > 0.7: task-level is the correct granularity; deprioritize H7

pilot_execution_order.note: BCS (1 GPU) + GPTA (1 GPU) + LOO (2 GPU) run in parallel
Seed stability (3 GPU) + clustering (1 GPU) run in parallel

decision_gates.decision: Proceed if environment works; otherwise debug
Proceed if transfer signal exists; otherwise switch benchmark
decision_gates.fail_pivot: Switch to Meta-World MT10 or heterogeneous LIBERO subset

decision_gates.decision: Proceed if at least one proxy shows promising correlation; otherwise reconsider proxy design
decision_gates.fail_pivot: Redesign proxies or increase model/data scale

decision_gates.decision: Assess seed stability and instance-level structure; adjust full experiment plan accordingly
decision_gates.fail_pivot: Add seed-averaging protocols; deprioritize instance-level analysis if task-level is sufficient
